rag_rules: Place input range assumptions in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use AGREE syntax for assumptions with valid type matching and visible identifiers.
Generate syntactically valid AGREE contracts within annex agree blocks.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible component features and types.
Use declared constants or visible variables for numeric bounds in AGREE contracts.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly as AGREE variables.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE expressions and AADL data types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes.
Boolean expressions in AGREE require explicit type declarations for clarity.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type contracts.
Avoid generating unsafe Boolean comparisons over opaque data types.
